zh.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Norton Esq.於大約1388年出生在英國越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯時，他的父親Sir Richard Norton30歲，母親Katherine Manningham24歲。他於1426年1月29日與Isabel Tempest結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1438年9月22日享年51歲，埋葬在英國越可爾沃斯。

zh-hans.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Norton Esq.于大约1388年出生在英国越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯时，他的父亲Sir Richard Norton30岁，母亲Katherine Manningham24岁。他于1426年1月29日与Isabel Tempest结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1438年9月22日享年51岁，埋葬在英国越可爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Norton Esq. was born about 1388, in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Norton, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Manningham, was 24. He married Isabel Tempest on 29 January 1426. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 22 September 1438, at the age of 51, and was buried in Wath, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Norton Esq. est né environ 1388, à Norton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Norton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Manningham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Tempest le 29 janvier 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1438, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Norton Esq. um 1388 in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Norton 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Manningham 24. Er hat am 29. Januar 1426 Isabel Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 22. September 1438 im Alter von 51 Jahren und wurde in Wath, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Norton Esq. è nato il circa 1388 nel Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Norton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Manningham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Tempest il 29 gennaio 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 22 settembre 1438, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Wath, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアノートン コニーエルズ
ja.Norton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアノートン
ja.Wath, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアワス
ja.Ripon, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアリプオン
ja.Norton, South Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Norton Esq.が約1388年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノートン コニーエルズで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Nortonは30歳，母Katherine Manninghamは24歳であった。1426年1月29日にIsabel Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1438年9月22日に51歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Norton Esq.(이)가 대략 1388년 영국 요르크실르 노르턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Norton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Manningham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1426년 1월 29일 Isabel Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1438년 9월 22일 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Norton Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Norton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Manningham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Tempest em 29 de janeiro de 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1438, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Norton Esq. родился около 1388 г. в местности нортон кониирс, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Norton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Manningham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Tempest 29 января 1426 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 22 сентября 1438 г. в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ват, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Norton Esq. nació aproximadamente 1388, en Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Norton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Manningham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel Tempest el 29 de enero de 1426. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1438, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
